decisions.market_question: Will Steve Hilton finish first in the 2026 California Governor primary election?
decisions.reasoning: The original thesis was based on a headline that appears to have been misread or was unreliable—the price has moved further against the position to 0.003, suggesting the market disagrees strongly with the premise. With no clear catalyst to reverse the move and the position already down 40%, there is no reason beyond hope to hold; cutting losses is the rational choice.
